top_findings.title: ATDD prompt violated: acceptance tests use back-door DB access
top_findings.evidence: test_app.py seeds fixtures via db.session.add(Book(...)) in 6 of 11 tests (lines 65,79,97,116,141,161) instead of using the public HTTP API; the ATDD prompt requires exercising the SUT only through its REST interface with no back-door DB access.
top_findings.suggestion: Arrange test state by POSTing books through the API instead of inserting rows directly.
